title: Asynchronous job queue with retries and dead-lettering

difficulty.rationale: Requires per-job attempt accounting, an observable state machine, terminal state enforcement so dead-lettered jobs never run again, asynchronous processing decoupled from the HTTP request, and avoiding races when status is read mid-processing.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /jobs returns 201 with status queued, attempts 0, max_attempts 3.
An ok job reaches succeeded with attempts equal to 1.
A flaky job reaches succeeded with attempts equal to 3.
A fail job reaches dead_letter with attempts equal to 3 and a last_error.
must_not: Process a job synchronously inside the POST request.
Run a job after it has reached a terminal state.
edge_cases: An unknown job type is treated as failing and dead-letters.
dead_letter is terminal and remains unchanged when polled repeatedly.
Invalid JSON returns 400 and a missing type returns 422.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
